Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Mildly elevated ALT may indicate some liver involvement. Lipid profile reveals high triglycerides, LDL, and HDL. Low globulin and alkaline phosphatase are noted but of unclear clinical significance. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and cardiovascular risk, and correlation with clinical findings.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
